subject: [PATCH v3 1/4] mm: bypass mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: The patch looks good and addresses the issue on arm64. However, it would be nice to have a test case to verify that the fix works as expected.

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)
reviews.summary: The patch is a good start, but it would be better to add a comment explaining why VM_EXEC readahead should not be throttled by the mmap_miss heuristic.

2026-04-02.patch_summary: The patch proposes to exclude VM_EXEC readahead from the mmap_miss heuristic in do_sync_mmap_readahead(). This is done by adding VM_EXEC to the list of excluded VM flags, similar to how VM_SEQ_READ is already excluded. The goal is to prevent the mmap_miss counter from disabling targeted exec readahead on arm64 with 64K base pages.
